title: Bridge Essay: Neural network modeling of psychoanalytic concepts.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Wind/Pride** (Phase 4) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Wind/Pride to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Neural network modeling of psychoanalytic concepts.** — Front Syst Neurosci. PMID: 40778287. DOI: 10.3389/fnsys.2025.1585619. Techniques used over decades in brain-based neural network modeling are applied to understanding processes involved in psychoanalysis. Behavioral change is interpreted as atransition, using simulated annealing, from aless to amore optimal attractor in acompetitive-cooperative dynamical system that includes analogs of the amygdala, prefrontal cortex, and hypothalamus, and the neurotransmitter norepinephrine. The article explores how psychoanalysis can facilitate the quest for the life that is
